tree.name: Robert Williams III
tree.tradeDescription: POR traded Jrue Holiday to Boston for Malcolm Brogdon, Robert Williams III, 2024 1st (GSW own, became Bub Carrington #14), and 2029 1st (BOS own). Portland also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jrue Holiday
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: POR sent Lillard to MIL, Nurkic/K.Johnson/N.Little to PHX. POR received Holiday and 3 1st-rd picks from MIL, Ayton and Camara from PHX.
assetsGivenUp.note: UCLA guard, All-Star point guard. Received from Milwaukee in Lillard mega-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Damian Lillard
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 6th overall by Portland in 2012, Weber State guard
